package.name: fcb_simulator
package.description: FCB (Fast Craft/Boat) 4-DOF MMG ship dynamics simulator for HIL testing. Implements Yasukawa & Yoshimura 2015 [R7] MMG model (surge/sway/yaw/roll) integrated via 4th-order Runge-Kutta. Replaces the Multimodal Fusion mock publisher by generating FilteredOwnShipState + TrackedTargetArray streams driven by L3 (M5) avoidance commands. PATH-H tooling code (relaxed MISRA). Reference: Yasukawa & Yoshimura 2015 [R7]; FCB tuning per Luo & Zou 2019.
